title: The Distance Between Us
theme: Distance becomes measured in dreams and expectations.
sceneDescription: Chapter 29 is presented as a privacy-safe stylized memoir scene using distant road, moving clouds, travel light. The Living Scene Layer supports the memory without changing the manuscript text or recreating real people photorealistically.
privacyNotes: Use privacy-safe, stylized, non-photorealistic character presence. Do not create final faces unless explicitly approved.
